author: codex
scope: Codex-only validator/rule-or-data triage for the next current unexpected_relation_endpoint_shape bucket after relation058; deterministic inspection only; no provider-backed commands, generated-output commands, durable data edits, code edits, LOG edits, manifest edits, submissions edits, retired.json edits, canonical edits, or wiki edits

current_count_if_observed.read_only_inventory_basis: Read-only SQLite/JQ inspection of the seven visible relation records named by the user, joined to endpoint record kinds in data/canonical.db and data/canonical/relations.jsonl.

bucket.name: serves_route project->project
bucket.validator_expectation: Current serves_route allows project|corridor -> route. It should not be widened to allow project -> project, especially not a project self-link.

recommendation.recommended_action: Retire the malformed self-linked serves_route submission and replace it with two valid serves_route project -> route relations if conductor wants to preserve the A/S route-scope fact.
recommendation.why_data_cleanup: The submitted object endpoint is the same project local observation as the subject, but the label/raw_text says the work affects the A and S lines. The source-backed fact is route scope, not project containment or a validator-permissible project self-edge.
recommendation.why_not_validator_code_gap: serves_route is intentionally constrained to route objects. Allowing project -> project would overlap with part_of_program or related-project semantics and would hide a clear endpoint selection error.

bad_submission_ids.retire_reason: Malformed route-scope relation: subject and object both point to project_a_train_rockaways_winter_2024, while serves_route requires a route object and the cited source says the work improves service along the A and S lines.

proposed_replacements.suggested_label: A Train Rockaways Winter Work serves A line
proposed_replacements.suggested_description: The planned A Train Rockaways winter work is source-backed as improving service along the A line.

proposed_replacements.suggested_label: A Train Rockaways Winter Work serves S Shuttle
proposed_replacements.suggested_description: The planned A Train Rockaways winter work is source-backed as improving service along the S line.

recommendation.replacement_note: The original source does not have same-source A/S route local observations. The proposed replacements therefore use direct canonical object_id route endpoints that already exist. If conductor wants strictly same-source route local ids, retire-only is safe and would still clear this issue, with route reconstruction deferred.

selected_relation_submission.label: A Train Rockaways Work affects A and S lines
selected_relation_submission.raw_text: riders across Jamaica Bay will be able to enjoy improved service along the A and S lines.

source_block.summary: The block describes planned A train work in the Rockaways, alternative service, LIRR discounts, dedicated shuttle service, and says completion will improve service along the A and S lines.
source_block.short_quote: improved service along the A and S lines

prior_notes: data/review_notes/codex-relation-cleanup-batch030-prep.json deferred this row because it needed reviewed split-or-retire handling.
data/review_notes/codex-relation-rule-or-data-next19-prep.json noted this row as a future route endpoint reconstruction candidate.

current_validator_files_checked.relevant_tests: serves_route project->route and corridor->route accepted; route->project rejected; no project->project acceptance.

expected_delta.caveat: Assumes no concurrent relation endpoint-shape work lands before conductor applies this cleanup. If conductor chooses retire-only instead of replacement, the endpoint-shape delta is still -1 but no route-scope rows are added.

data_cleanup_steps: Retire submission sub_69102bf0c780f965 with a reason tying the malformed serves_route project -> project self-link to this prep artifact.

Preferred preservation path: append two accepted replacement relation submissions for meeting_doc_160446 with relation_kind serves_route, subject_local_observation_id project_a_train_rockaways_winter_2024, and object_id route_meeting-doc-135451-a-line / route_meeting-doc-160271-s-shuttle.
Use meeting_doc_160446#p005_c0004 as evidence for both replacement relations, with source_quote or raw_text centered on 'improved service along the A and S lines'.
Alternative conservative path: retire-only if conductor does not want direct canonical route object_id replacements from a source without same-source route local observations.
Run only the conductor-owned materialize/validate lane after applying, outside this bounded prep task.

code_patch_plan.reason: No validator patch is recommended. Keep serves_route object endpoints constrained to route records; the current row is a data endpoint mistake.

commands_run_read_only: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db 'pragma table_info(relations); pragma table_info(records); pragma table_info(record_submissions); pragma table_info(evidence_refs);'
jq targeted read of data/canonical/relations.jsonl for the seven remaining visible record ids
sqlite3 targeted join of the seven visible relation ids to endpoint record kinds and submission ids
sqlite3 singleton bucket grouping over the seven visible rows
rg targeted lookup of the seven selected submission ids in data/submissions
rg targeted lookup for sub_69102bf0c780f965 and relation_a-rockaways-affects-a-s-lines in review notes, retired.json, submissions, and canonical relations
sed targeted reads of prior notes mentioning relation_a-rockaways-affects-a-s-lines
sqlite3 same-source record inventory for meeting_doc_160446 Rockaway/A/S/route records
jq targeted read of raw/sources/meeting_doc_160446/blocks.jsonl for p005_c0003 and p005_c0004
sqlite3 global route lookup for A and S route records
sqlite3 endpoint record and replacement collision checks for project_a-train-rockaways-winter-2024 to A/S routes
